testingApproach.isolation: No isolation needed - code inspection, build/test commands, and CLI help are read-only operations

group1-channels.summary: New channel tools registered correctly, old tools removed, message passing and timeout behavior verified through unit tests

group2-attestation-part1.summary: All ~28 attestation spawning functions removed, finishJob simplified, guardDoneTransition now only checks for passing check record

group3-attestation-part2.summary: Manual attestation CLI preserved, CreateCheckRecord function and CLI preserved, build and tests pass after attestation removal

group4-mcp-state.summary: MCP server registers zero tools while preserving channel notification relay, state machine maps checking→in_progress, briefings use 'done' state, tests pass

group5-email-cross.summary: Email notifications route through DigestCollector, escalation bypasses digest, digest produces meaningful content, hourly flush wired, channel tools work with simplified state machine
